sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115781" key="yixi/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῑχ-ίον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψίξ,</foreign> <sense id="n115781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crumb, Ev. Matt.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4099.tlg001:15:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.27</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n115781.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> of stomachic residue after emesis, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:23:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.23.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
